name: manage-deps
description: Workflow to manage Flutter dependencies including updates, conflict resolution, security audits, and dependency optimization

workflowSteps.name: Dependency Audit
workflowSteps.description: Review all dependencies for updates, security issues, and usage

workflowSteps.name: Update Strategy
workflowSteps.description: Plan safe update path with testing checkpoints

workflowSteps.name: Conflict Resolution
workflowSteps.description: Resolve version conflicts and dependency constraints

workflowSteps.name: Security Check
workflowSteps.description: Scan for known vulnerabilities and outdated packages

workflowSteps.name: Optimization
workflowSteps.description: Remove unused dependencies and suggest lighter alternatives

workflowSteps.name: Testing Plan
workflowSteps.description: Define testing strategy for dependency updates
